name: t0-trader
description: Script-output skill. MUST run scripts/final_t0.py --target <股票名或代码> for the manual T0 watch assistant, or scripts/final_t0.py --target <股票名或代码> --monitor --once for monitoring, and return stdout verbatim. Manual output must start with `🎯 T0 盯盘助理` and include `🔍 扫描`、`🚩 关键价位`、`🕒 今日关键事件`、`💰 仓位管控`、`👀 下一步只盯`. Monitor mode only prints trigger/expired/blocked/invalidated alerts or nothing; observation-zone entry must stay silent. Never handwrite, summarize, shorten, restyle, translate, add markdown tables, add disclaimers, or claim an order was placed.
